diff_snippet:
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ definitions:
           - PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)/src" python3 -m revue.cli validate --config .revue.yml
           - echo "[revue] Starting AI code review..."
           - export PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)/src"
-          - export APP_ENV=staging  # Enable REVUE_TIER_OVERRIDE for CI
+          - export APP_ENV=production  # Use real licence validation via revue-io.fly.dev
           - export REVUE_METRICS_ENABLED=1
comment_body_excerpt:
**🟡 [MEDIUM] APP_ENV is set to 'production' in the CI pipeline, which enables real licence validation against the production Fly.io database. If the CI pipeline is compromised, an attacker can generate unlimited-review pro-tier licenses and inject them into the production database.**
*Zara · Securit
